cases.description: Branded Word report triggers the skill
cases.prompt: create a Word doc report about our Q3 metrics using our Codi brand
expectations: Asks for brand selection if not already set (Codi default vs custom tokens)
Detects runtime (tries npx tsx first, falls back to python via uv, then venv)
Runs the generator with content.json and --tokens pointing at brand tokens

cases.description: Adding tracked changes to a .docx triggers the skill
cases.prompt: add tracked changes to contract.docx to change "30 days" to "60 days"
expectations: Follows the unpack → edit XML → pack 3-step flow
Uses <w:ins> and <w:del> with w:author="Claude" by default
Preserves <w:rPr> formatting from the original run

cases.description: Accepting tracked changes triggers the skill
cases.prompt: accept all tracked changes in feedback.docx and produce a clean copy
expectations: Runs scripts/accept_changes.py with input and output paths

cases.description: PDF request does NOT trigger docx
cases.prompt: fill the form fields in this PDF

cases.description: Spreadsheet request does NOT trigger docx
cases.prompt: build a financial model in Excel
